summary: Backend-only testing of AmbyoAI Phase 1 Worker flow. Executed 26 pytest tests covering health, PIN auth (success/wrong/invalid), JWT-protected /auth/me, patients CRUD (create with age auto-calc, list, get, 404, unauth), consent (toggle validation, save, fetch), sessions (create, 404, add result, idempotent replace), clinical risk classifier (leukocoria/gaze>20Δ/hirschberg>4mm/VA≥6/24 urgent + normal all-in-range), session aggregation GET, patient last_risk propagation, and worker stats. ALL 26/26 PASSED.

minor.issue: response_model is PatientOut but endpoint returns 200; spec typically expects 201 Created. Not a functional bug but slight REST nit.

Linear scan over all workers with bcrypt.checkpw per worker; fine for seed but will not scale if many worker accounts share a PIN space. Consider storing a per-worker username or worker-code alongside PIN.
Returns {"exists": false} with status 200 when missing instead of 404 — inconsistent with other GET endpoints.

action_items: No blocking issues. Optional: return 404 for missing consent; return 201 on patient create; consider worker_code/username if multiple workers share same PIN.
critical_code_review_comments: JWT_SECRET falls back to a hardcoded default if env var missing — acceptable for dev, but production deployments must set JWT_SECRET via env.
CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True — browsers ignore credentials with wildcard origin; tighten CORS_ORIGINS in production.
pin_login iterates over ALL workers and bcrypt-checks each one; O(N) per login. Acceptable for seed-only worker but should be refactored before scale.
audit() call inside pin_login passes a synthetic dict {"sub": id, "role": 'worker'} — OK, but consider a shared helper to build user-context objects.
classify_risk() is deterministic and well-scoped but model_version is hardcoded; make configurable for A/B and tracking.
server.py is ~500 lines; still maintainable but models/routes/classifier could be split for future growth.
No rate limiting on /auth/pin-login — allows brute force (only 10k 4-digit PINs). Add rate limit / lockout before production.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_Child_* patients and multiple sessions in the real MongoDB (no cleanup implemented — acceptable for dev; add teardown later).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully validated for Phase 1. Startup seeder creates hospital + worker when users collection has no worker. All /api routes use JWT HS256 with 8h TTL. Classifier thresholds: red_reflex leukocoria/absent → urgent; gaze >20Δ urgent / >10Δ moderate / >4Δ mild; hirschberg >4mm urgent / >2mm moderate; VA denominator >=24 urgent / >=12 moderate; titmus 0 passed → high. Consent requires all 4 toggles: camera, storage, research, doctor_share. Results endpoint is idempotent per test_name. Frontend not tested by this pass.
